name: aiko-dev
description: Top-level dev runner for the Aiko assistant (FastAPI backend + Vite React frontend).

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names api,web --prefix-colors magenta,cyan "python -m app.web" "npm --prefix web run dev"
scripts.desktop: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names api,web,tauri --prefix-colors magenta,cyan,green "python -m app.web" "npm --prefix web run dev" "npm --prefix web run tauri:dev"
